mapper.select: SELECT FROM deal d JOIN shop s ON s.id=d.shop_id WHERE d.shop_id=#{shopId} AND d.region=#{region} AND d.audit_status=1 AND d.status=1 AND d.is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY d.id
SELECT FROM deal d JOIN shop s ON s.id=d.shop_id WHERE d.id=#{dealId} AND d.region=#{region} AND d.audit_status=1 AND d.status=1 AND d.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT id,deal_id,name,quantity,price,sort FROM deal_item WHERE deal_id=#{dealId} ORDER BY sort,id
mapper.update: UPDATE deal SET stock=CASE WHEN stock=-1 THEN -1 ELSE stock-#{quantity} END,sold_count=sold_count+#{quantity},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{dealId} AND status=1 AND (stock=-1 OR stock>=#{quantity})
UPDATE deal SET stock=CASE WHEN stock=-1 THEN -1 ELSE stock+#{quantity} END,sold_count=CASE WHEN sold_count>=#{quantity} THEN sold_count-#{quantity} ELSE 0 END WHERE id=#{dealId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id WHERE o.id=#{orderId} AND o.user_id=#{userId} AND o.region=#{region}
SELECT FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id WHERE o.order_no=#{orderNo}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND region=#{region} AND pay_status=#{payStatus}

SELECT FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id WHERE o.user_id=#{userId} AND o.region=#{region} AND o.pay_status=#{payStatus} ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status=2,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{orderId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND pay_status=0 AND status=1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id WHERE o.pay_status=0 AND o.status=1 AND o.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND o.expire_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY o.expire_at ASC, o.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status=2, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{orderId} AND pay_status=0 AND status=1
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.order_id, p.order_no, p.channel, p.channel_txn, p.amount, p.currency, p.status, p.raw_response FROM payment p JOIN `order` o ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE p.status = 0 AND ( o.status = 2 OR (o.pay_status = 0 AND o.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND o.expire_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status=2, raw_response=#{rawResponse}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{paymentId} AND status=0
mapper.select: SELECT id,order_id,order_no,channel,channel_txn,amount,currency,status,raw_response FROM payment WHERE order_id=#{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id,order_id,order_no,channel,channel_txn,amount,currency,status,raw_response FROM payment WHERE channel=#{channel} AND channel_txn=#{channelTxn}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status=1,raw_response=#{rawResponse},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND status=0
UPDATE `order` SET pay_status=1,pay_method=#{channel},paid_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{orderId} AND pay_status=0 AND status=1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon WHERE order_id=#{orderId}
SELECT FROM coupon c JOIN deal d ON d.id=c.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=c.shop_id WHERE c.order_id=#{orderId} AND c.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY c.id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon c JOIN deal d ON d.id=c.deal_id WHERE c.user_id=#{userId} AND d.region=#{region} AND c.status=#{status}

SELECT FROM coupon c JOIN deal d ON d.id=c.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=c.shop_id WHERE c.user_id=#{userId} AND d.region=#{region} AND c.status=#{status} ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM coupon c JOIN deal d ON d.id=c.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=c.shop_id WHERE c.code=#{code} AND s.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND d.region=#{region}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status=2,verify_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,verify_by=#{operatorId} WHERE code=#{code} AND status=1 AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at>=CURRENT_DATE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deal d JOIN shop s ON s.id=d.shop_id WHERE d.id=coupon.deal_id AND s.id=coupon.shop_id AND s.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND d.region=#{region})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND status=2
SELECT id,order_id,coupon_id,amount,reason,status,audit_by,audit_reason,audited_at,created_at,updated_at FROM refund WHERE order_id=#{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET pay_status=2,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{orderId} AND pay_status=1
UPDATE coupon SET status=4 WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND status=1
